title: でこぼこトライアングル

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Glory to the warrior, glory! Glory to me, glory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even my speeches are more tantalizing than usual
today. Oh, how I wish to share them with
someone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: La la laaa. ♪ Isn't that riiight, Ayabeee? ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Move it. I'm trying to train.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You're trying to say that you don't want me in
front of you... but rather running beside you! I
assume that's what you mean?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: How did you come to that conclusion?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Just leave me alone!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Good. I think I've gotten far enough a—agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm so, so sorry! It was my fault for zoning out!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Doto? Well, it doesn't look like you're hurt. I'm in
a hurry—later.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? My leg won't move where I want it to...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Our shoelaces are tangled!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaahhh?! H-how did that happen?! I-I'm really
sorry!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabeee! Wherever might you beee? Let's aim to
perform together at the La Scala in Milan!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Argh, she's caught up with me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry—I'll untie us right away! Um, this
goes... through here? And then... Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaah! I made it even worse! H-h-how did that
happen?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...There's no time. We're going to have to escape
together!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Right, left, right, left! Come on, we're picking up
the pace!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-o-okay! One, two, one... twooo?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You both are just like Don Carlo and Rodrigo! Oh
my! If I were to join in, we could weave a
brand-new tale!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them end up running all around,
getting more exercise than they would have from
any regular training session.
